data.title: Order Out for Delivery!
data.body: Your order BBY-10038 is on its way. Estimated arrival: 15 minutes.

data.title: You reached Gold Tier!
data.body: Congratulations! You've been upgraded to Gold tier. Enjoy 1.5x coin earnings, priority support, and exclusive rewards.

data.title: You received a Gift Card!
data.body: User A sent you a ₹1,000 Burger Empire gift card. Message: "Happy Birthday! Treat yourself to some burgers!"

data.title: Flash Sale: 40% Off Big Baby Meals!
data.body: Today only! Use code BIGDEAL40 at checkout. Valid on orders above ₹200.

data.title: Referral Success!
data.body: Your friend User A just placed their first order using your referral code. You earned 50 Baby Coins!

data.title: Order Delivered!
data.body: Your order BBY-10045 has been delivered. Enjoy your healthy meal! You earned 80 Baby Coins (2x Healthy boost).

data.title: How was your Big Baby Loaded?
data.body: Rate your recent order BBY-10042 and earn 10 Baby Coins. Your feedback helps us improve!

data.title: Reservation Reminder
data.body: Don't forget! You have a table for 6 reserved on March 22 at 7:30 PM. See you there!

data.title: Student Pass Approved!
data.body: Your student verification for Abc University is approved. Enjoy 10% off on every order until June 2027!

data.title: New Feature: Meal Plans!
data.body: Subscribe to meal plans and never miss a meal. Daily Baby, Healthy Week, and Weekend Feast plans now available.

data.title: Birthday Reward Unlocked!
data.body: Happy Birthday! We've added 100 Baby Coins to your account. Celebrate with your favourite burger!

data.title: Meal Plan Renewal Due
data.body: Your Healthy Week plan renews on March 20. Update your payment method or manage your subscription in the app.
